sentence: Dihiligently done is still lowtmaxxing's least favorite kind of finished.

wombos.definition: Doing something diligently but also being a dick about it at the same time
wombos.example: I'm not just doing it diligently I'm dihoing it dihiligently.

wombos.definition: Maximizing your lowted energy — being the absolute greatest at something while being as understated as possible about it. The art of quietly maxxing.
